case_title: MINDY M KINDHART VS. GAP(ITM) INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA OLD NAVY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KINDHART, MINDY M AS TO DEFENDANT GAP(ITM) INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA OLD NAVY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
